overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk driving game showing a player navigating a Mercedes G-Wagon through Night City at night. The vehicle drives through narrow neon-lit streets, passes pedestrian areas, and navigates intersections with heavy atmospheric haze and wet reflective roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk downtown corridor with overhead pedestrian bridge

agents.ego_description: driving straight through narrow city street following a white sedan ahead

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane maintaining distance

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with 'SYS' text mounted on building facade
enclosed walkway bridge crossing over the street connecting two buildings
tall dark glass building with illuminated windows lining the left side
tall building with neon accents and glowing signage on the right side
lower level shop signs with red and blue neon illumination

segments.scene_description: Driving through a narrow urban canyon in a futuristic city at night, following a white sedan. The street is flanked by tall commercial towers with neon signage, including a prominent 'SYS' sign ahead and an overhead pedestrian bridge crossing above the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with elevated pedestrian walkways

events.description: turns right from narrow corridor into wider street with visible pedestrian sidewalks

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn then proceeding straight past pedestrians on the right sidewalk

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the elevated sidewalk on the right side

entered.detail: elevated sidewalk with metal railings running along the right side of the street
bright neon signs for ground level shops and businesses
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road

segments.scene_description: After turning right from the narrow corridor, the scene opens into a medium-width commercial street with elevated pedestrian walkways on the right. Pedestrians walk along the railings while neon storefront signs illuminate the sidewalk, and the vehicle approaches a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: major commercial intersection with large-format digital advertising

events.description: enters large intersection with multiple crosswalks and heavy digital signage

agents.ego_description: driving through a wide intersection surrounded by large digital billboards and crossing pedestrians

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying 'NCART' and other advertising content
tall vertical digital screen showing a face and commercial content
wide open intersection space with multiple crossing points and traffic signals
suspended traffic lights and directional signs above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a major commercial intersection dominated by massive digital billboards on both sides, including a prominent NCART sign. The space opens up significantly with wide crosswalks and moderate pedestrian traffic crossing the street, while the road surface shows wet reflective asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection during right turn maneuver

events.description: initiates right turn at intersection, steering wheel turns sharply
comes to complete stop at intersection waiting for pedestrians and crossing traffic

agents.ego_description: executing a right turn at the intersection then waiting for pedestrians to clear the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrians crossing the street in front of the vehicle at the crosswalk
dark sedan waiting at the intersection to the left of the ego vehicle

entered.detail: yellow striped crosswalk markings immediately in front of the vehicle
dark commercial building with illuminated entrance on the left side of the turn

segments.scene_description: The vehicle initiates a sharp right turn at the intersection, bringing the crosswalk markings into the foreground. After completing the turn, the car stops to wait for pedestrians crossing in front and a vehicle waiting to the left, with the large digital billboards now behind the vehicle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a dense cyberpunk cityscape that transitions from a narrow urban canyon into a wide, neon-drenched commercial intersection. It begins by following a white sedan through a tight corridor of towering commercial buildings and neon signage, passing beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge. As the vehicle turns right, the environment opens into a medium-width street lined with elevated walkways and glowing storefronts before expanding further into a massive intersection dominated by towering digital billboards and wet, reflective asphalt. The scene then shifts as the car executes a sharp right turn across wide crosswalks, bringing the road markings into the foreground. Finally, the vehicle comes to a halt to wait for pedestrians and oncoming traffic, leaving the bright glow of the NCART billboards behind.
